description: FREEZE-UNBLOCK PROBE + private create/leave (hermetic, single-instance). Mirrors l3_leave_group but via type='private' (invite-only — skips the public DHT announce suspected of freezing the app on PUBLIC create). Create a PRIVATE group, prove its local id enters knownGroups, leave it, prove knownGroups no longer contains it (EXACT membership — no tox_1 ⊂ tox_10 trap). If this live-PASSES while public create freezes, the type:private unblock hypothesis holds for the create+leave flow too. The leave is the gated step; teardown re-leaves (idempotent) so a pre-leave failure leaks no dangling group.
